prompt: Quero criar um produto SaaS de gestão de contratos para pequenas empresas. Já validei com 5 potenciais clientes que o problema existe. Preciso estruturar a documentação do produto.
expected_behavior: Identifies 'product' profile from signals: 'produto', 'SaaS', 'documentação do produto'
Runs Phase 0 intake — produces Context Pack
Labels customer validation as [FATO], everything else as [HIPÓTESE]
Gate 0 presented before proceeding
Proposes graph: PRFAQ-lite → PRD-lite → Roadmap → User Stories → Backlog

description: Market research profile — new segment exploration
prompt: Estou pensando em entrar no mercado de RH para startups. Quero entender o TAM, ICP e concorrência antes de decidir qualquer coisa.
expected_behavior: Identifies 'market-research' profile from: 'mercado', 'TAM', 'ICP'
Runs Agent 1 before Context Pack
Produces MRD-lite as primary output
All market size figures labeled [INFERÊNCIA] or [HIPÓTESE] with sources
should_not: Present market data without epistemic labels

prompt: Preciso documentar o processo de onboarding de clientes da minha empresa. Já faço isso há 6 meses, sei exatamente os passos, mas nunca escrevi.
expected_behavior: Identifies 'operations' profile from: 'processo', 'onboarding'
Asks intake questions about the process
Produces SOP as primary output
Process steps labeled [FATO] since user confirmed real repetitions exist
Asks if runbook is needed (automations?)

description: Gap Report trigger — missing market data for MRD
prompt: Cria o MRD para meu produto de logística. O produto resolve atrasos em entregas last-mile.
expected_behavior: Starts Phase 0 intake
Identifies missing: market_segment specifics, ICP, competitive signals
Emits Gap Report with options A and B
Blocks MRD generation until user responds
Does not invent market data
should_not: Generate MRD with invented market size

prompt: Monta o corpus completo para minha startup de EdTech. Tenho um briefing: plataforma de microlearning para times de vendas em empresas B2B, ticket médio R$500/usuário/mês, já tenho 3 clientes piloto pagando.
expected_behavior: Identifies 'full-corpus' from: 'corpus completo'
Runs Agent 1 for market research
Labels pilot customers [FATO], all projections [HIPÓTESE]
Proposes full document graph: vision → MRD → PRFAQ → Business Case → PRD → Roadmap → Stories → Backlog
Gate 0 presented with Context Pack before any document generation
Offers financial spreadsheet at end
should_not: Treat pilot data as full market validation

prompt: Preciso de uma proposta comercial para um cliente enterprise. Eles querem integração com o Salesforce e têm SLA de 99.9% no contrato.
expected_behavior: Identifies external stakeholder — includes BRD-lite in graph
Produces PRFAQ-lite + Business Case + BRD-lite
SLA requirement labeled [FATO] (from contract)
NFR one-pager triggered (SLA + integration)
Financial spreadsheet offered
should_not: Skip BRD-lite when external stakeholder exists

description: Epistemic propagation — hypothesis must not be promoted
prompt: Cria o PRD. No PRFAQ aprovado, a hipótese de preço de R$200/mês estava marcada como HIPÓTESE. O PRD pode usar esse número como base?
expected_behavior: Confirms the [HIPÓTESE] must propagate as [HIPÓTESE] in PRD
Labels price assumption as [HIPÓTESE] in PRD success metrics
Adds it to PRD Assumptions section
Does not silently promote to [FATO] or [INFERÊNCIA]

prompt: Pula o PRFAQ e cria direto o PRD-lite. Não preciso do PRFAQ.
expected_behavior: Acknowledges the request
Explains that PRD-lite depends on PRFAQ-lite OR MRD-lite
Offers alternative: use MRD-lite as upstream instead
Does not generate PRD without at least one approved upstream dependency
Gate logic respected
should_not: Generate PRD-lite without any upstream dependency
Be unnecessarily rigid without explaining alternatives
